acceptedIds: Student photo ID from an accredited NH school
exceptions: Voters without photo ID may complete a challenged voter affidavit and have their photo taken at the polls. The photo is used to verify identity and is kept on file.
provisionalBallotRules: New Hampshire uses the challenged voter affidavit process instead of provisional ballots for ID issues.
phonesAtPollsDetail: New Hampshire allows cell phones in polling places. You may take notes and refer to materials.
